overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting nighttime navigation from a vessel's bridge. The view shows the bow moving through calm harbor waters with operational navigation monitors displaying radar and depth charts overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward-facing windows

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship through the harbor while monitoring the radar and navigation displays

entered.detail: three-screen display array mounted overhead showing radar, chart plotter, and ship data
circular radar screen with rotating sweep and yellow target returns
navigation monitor displaying depth contours and chart data
blue-screen monitor showing ship systems data
white painted bow of the vessel extending forward into the water
metal safety railing on the port side of the bridge wing
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the bridge wing
dark calm water of the harbor extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The ship cruises steadily through the harbor at night, viewed from the enclosed bridge. Overhead navigation monitors glow with radar sweeps and chart data, while the bow cuts through dark calm waters ahead. The scene remains stable with no other vessels in sight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward-facing windows

events.description: small white vessel appears on the port side and passes by the bow

agents.ego_description: maintaining course while monitoring the small vessel passing on the port side

notable_agents.action: small white boat passing perpendicular to the ship's course on the port side

entered.detail: small white boat visible against the dark water on the port side

segments.scene_description: A small white vessel enters the frame from the port side, passing perpendicular to the ship's bow. The navigation monitors continue their rhythmic radar sweeps overhead as the ship maintains its steady forward progress through the harbor, with the small boat eventually passing behind the field of view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a ship's bridge, transitioning from a solitary cruise through a dark harbor to a brief encounter with another vessel. It begins with the bow cutting through calm, dark waters under the glow of overhead navigation monitors displaying rhythmic radar sweeps and chart data. As the ship maintains its steady progress, the solitude of the scene shifts when a small white vessel enters the frame from the port side. The camera continues its forward trajectory as the smaller boat passes perpendicularly across the bow before finally disappearing behind the field of view.
